items.summary: Implement a login page (frontend/src/components/Login.tsx) that displays a username and password form. On submission, validate the credentials using the existing useAuth hook (frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts) which checks hardcoded credentials stored in localStorage. On success, redirect the user to the Dashboard; on failure, show an inline error alert.

Configure the auth guard in frontend/src/App.tsx so that unauthenticated users are redirected to the login page when attempting to access protected routes (Dashboard, Inventory, Billing, Reports). Authenticated users visiting /login should be redirected to the Dashboard. All existing routes and their behavior must remain unchanged.
